stateVariables.label: Next Topic
stateVariables.description: The next topic to be visited

stateVariables.label: Communication Preference
stateVariables.description: How the user prefers to be contacted — 'email' or 'phone'.

stateVariables.label: Contact Email
stateVariables.description: Email address to contact the user.

stateVariables.label: Contact Phone
stateVariables.description: Phone number to contact the user.

stateVariables.label: Runtime Condition 1
stateVariables.description: Runtime condition evaluation for if statements

nodes.description: Top-level router. Sends the user to comms preference intake.
nodes.label: Router

stateUpdates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Determine whether the user wants to set their contact preference.

nodes.description: Gather the communication preference, then branch to email or phone.

stateUpdates.communication_preference: result.communication_preference if "communication_preference" in result else state.communication_preference

stateUpdates.contact_email: result.contact_email if "contact_email" in result else state.contact_email

stateUpdates.contact_phone: result.contact_phone if "contact_phone" in result else state.contact_phone

tools.name: capture_comms_intake_fields
tools.description: Capture fields as the user provides them.

tools.name: cancel_comms_intake_collect
tools.description: Stop collecting and return to the start when the user changes their mind, cancels, says never mind, or asks for something else instead.

nodes.label: Comms Intake

stateUpdates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Ask the user for communication_preference. Use exactly this message: "How would you like us to contact you — email or phone?" When they answer, call capture_comms_intake_fields with communication_preference.

beforeReasoningIteration.enabled: (state.AgentScriptInternal_condition_1) and (state.communication_preference is not None and state.contact_email is None)

stateUpdates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Ask the user for contact_email. Use exactly this message: "What is your email address?" When they answer, call capture_comms_intake_fields with contact_email.

beforeReasoningIteration.enabled: (state.AgentScriptInternal_condition_1) and (state.communication_preference is not None and state.contact_phone is None)

stateUpdates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Ask the user for contact_phone. Use exactly this message: "What is your phone number?" When they answer, call capture_comms_intake_fields with contact_phone.

beforeReasoningIteration.enabled: state.communication_preference is not None and (state.contact_email is not None or state.contact_phone is not None)

stateUpdates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
All required details are collected. Do not ask for anything further.

beforeReasoningIteration.enabled: state.communication_preference is None or (state.contact_email is None and state.contact_phone is None)

stateUpdates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
If the user changes their mind, cancels, says never mind, or asks for something else instead, do not ask for the next field — call cancel_comms_intake_collect instead.

afterReasoning.enabled: (state.communication_preference is None or (state.contact_email is None and state.contact_phone is None)) and state.AgentScriptInternal_next_topic=="__EMPTY__"
